findings.description: High-entropy string flows to Function constructor (confidence: medium, flow: same-scope)
findings.remediation: Review this file for encrypted payload patterns. The combination of high-entropy encoded data and dynamic code execution is characteristic of encrypted loaders used in supply chain attacks.
